top_signals.title: Oil Steady as Hormuz Flows Persist and OPEC+ Flags Higher Supply
top_signals.summary: Oil steadied, following two days of gains, as flows through the Strait of Hormuz persisted and OPEC+ signaled higher supplies, fanning concerns about a glut.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix Seeks Valuation Boost in $29 Billion US Listing
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc.'s $29 billion US stock-market listing may help the company compete in the global stock market for memory chips used in AI computing. Bloomberg's Sangmi Cha breaks down the strategy. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mikazuki wins fourth term as Shiga governor
top_signals.summary: The incumbent governor fended off three other rivals, one of whom ran on a platform of opposing a transportation tax he is proposing.
